title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
notes: Go to graphics options and disable fog, otherwise you won't be able to see anything in game!

title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
notes: Played the first 30 minutes, worked great

title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time
notes:
Turn off fog.
Controller detection is missing or completely wonky, just like all the DirectX® 9.0 games.
Had to turn off fog, but it's a bug on nvidia driver, hence platinum
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes: Flawless. Played with Steam Controller and everything worked fine.
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time
Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes: If you have an Nvidia gpu, you have to disable the fog. But I remember having the issue on Windows too, so... I guess it means the game works *exactly* like on Windows? :D
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes: Everything works except the Steam Controller. Well, the SC itself works but configuring it doesn't make any difference to the game. E.g. the A and B buttons are switched, no matter how I configure them. Also: Beware that you need to do manual fixes to support modern screen resolutions and to remove the fog glitch (see the GOG wiki page for this game), but those issues are also present on Windows 10
